chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No.34 of 2026 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs 1. For orders on office objection as at “A” 2. For hearing of bail application ------------------------------------------------------ 26.02.2026 Mr. Sharafuddin Kanhar, A.P.G. & Ms. Rukhsana Qassim Mirjat, ADPP SIP Rizwan and ASI Muhammad Haroon of PS Malir City ------------------------------------ Applicant/accused Syed Muhammad Wasiq Iqbal son of Syed Muhammad Iqbal was admitted on pre-arrest bail by this Court vide order dated 07.01.2026. On the last date of hearing, applicant/accused was present in Court but his counsel was called absent and the matter was adjourned for today in his presence. Today, neither the applicant nor his counsel is in attendance. Mr. Waseem Raza, advocate, holding brief on behalf of Mr. Waryam Ali Kalhoro, counsel for applicant, states that latter is out of station. IO present in Court submits that complainant of this case is a practicing advocate and the parties have settled their dispute outside the Court and they have filed the proper application before the concerned Court. This is a pre-arrest bail and the applicant is duty bound to appear in Court on each and every date but he has chosen to remain absent, therefore, interim pre-arrest bail granted to him by this Court vide order dated 07.01.2026 is hereby recalled and the same is dismissed on account of non-prosecution. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
